negative_controls: No finding is closed by a path-only citation without a requirement-specific report entry.
Every preserved IMPLEMENTED row maps to a focused pytest selector or checksum-addressed committed reference.
Every literal contradiction found during source/workflow inspection is downgraded, not explained away.
